info.title: Crank Benchmarks Controller
info.description: The Crank controller orchestrates benchmark jobs on Crank agents.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --config
options.description: Configuration file or url.

options.name: --scenario
options.description: Scenario to execute.

options.name: --job
options.description: Creates a job that is not defined in configuration.

options.name: --profile
options.description: Profile name.

options.name: --script
options.description:
Execute a named script available in the configuration
files. Can be used multiple times.

options.name: --json
options.description: Saves the results as json in the specified file.

options.name: --csv
options.description: Saves the results as csv in the specified file.

options.name: --compare
options.description:
An optional filename to compare the results to. Can
be used multiple times.

options.name: --variable
options.description: Variable

options.name: --variable-json
options.description: Typed Variable

options.name: --sql
options.description:
Connection string or environment variable name of the
SQL Server Database to store results in.

options.name: --table
options.description:
Table name or environment variable name of the SQL
table to store results in.

options.name: --es
options.description: Elasticsearch server url to store results in.

options.name: --index
options.description:
Index name of the Elasticsearch server to store
results in.

options.name: --relay
options.description:
Connection string or environment variable name of the
Azure Relay namespace used to access the Crank Agent
endpoints. e.g.,
'Endpoint=sb://mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net;...',
'MY_AZURE_RELAY_ENV'.
When no value is provided it falls back to Azure CLI
(e.g., az login) authentication.

options.name: --session
options.description: A logical identifier to group related jobs.

options.name: --description
options.description: A string describing the job.

options.name: --property
options.description:
Some custom key/value that will be added to the
results, .e.g. --property arch=arm --property
os=linux

options.name: --no-measurements
options.description:
Remove all measurements from the stored results. For
instance, all samples of a measure won't be stored,
only the final value.

options.name: --no-metadata
options.description:
Remove all metadata from the stored results. The
metadata is only necessary for being to generate
friendly outputs.

options.name: --auto-flush
options.description:
Runs a single long-running job and flushes
measurements automatically.

options.name: --repeat
options.description:
The job to repeat using the '--span' or
'--iterations' argument.

options.name: --span
options.description: The duration while the job is repeated.

options.name: --chart
options.description: Renders a chart for multi-value results.

options.name: --chart-type
options.description:
Type of chart to render. Values are 'bar' (default)
or 'hex'

options.name: --chart-scale
options.description:
Scale for chart. Values are 'off' (default) or
'auto'. When scale is off, the min value starts at 0.

options.name: --iterations
options.description: The number of iterations.

options.name: --interval
options.description: The measurements interval in seconds. Default is 1.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Verbose output

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Quiet output, only the results are displayed

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Excludes the specified number of high and low
results, e.g., 1, 1:0 (exclude the lowest), 0:3
(exclude the 3 highest)

options.name: --exclude-order
options.description:
The result to use to detect the high and low results,
e.g., 'load:http/rps/mean'

options.name: --debug
options.description:
Saves the final configuration to a file and skips the
execution of the benchmark, e.g., '-d debug.json'

options.name: --command-line-property
options.description:
Saves the final crank command line in a custom
'command-line' property, excluding all unnecessary
and security sensitive arguments.

options.name: --cert-client-id
options.description: Service principal client id for cert based auth.

options.name: --cert-tenant-id
options.description: Service principal tenant id for cert based auth.

options.name: --cert-thumbprint
options.description: Thumbprint for cert.

options.name: --cert-path
options.description: Location of the certificate to be used for auth.

options.name: --cert-pwd
options.description: Password of the certificate to be used for auth.

options.name: --cert-sni
options.description:
Enable subject name / issuer based authentication
(SNI).
